description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

The Coverage tab shows tier badges (EXECUTED/LINKED/CLAIMED/UNCOVERED) but never opens the box: which MFAs in the requirement's binding closure were reached, and by which tests? That's the data the per-test coverdata artifact provides; without it surfaced, branch_guard_untested_realization is opaque.

Per requirement, render: "Closure: N MFAs. Reached: M (by tests T1, T2). Unreached: K." Source the closure from realization tier output; source per-test reach from .spec/_coverage/per_test.coverdata via the existing triangulation pipeline (lib/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation.ex).

Should degrade to a clear "coverage artifact unavailable" message when the artifact is missing — leans on child #2's :degraded leg state.

- HtmlTest "render_coverage_tab — per-requirement bind-closure view" — 6 cases covering happy-path closure line, no-tests case, empty closure, both degraded banners, backwards-compat
- ReviewTest "Coverage tab bind-closure integration" — 3 cases covering build_view plumbing + degraded paths

Verification stubs flipped: existing html_test.exs entry now also covers specled.spec_review.coverage_tab_bind_closure; new entry for coverage_triangulation_test.exs added.

Summary: Coverage tab now opens the box on each requirement's realization closure: "Closure: N MFAs. Reached: M (by tests T1, T2). Unreached: K." Closure size comes from the realization-tier closure walk; reach comes from .spec/_coverage/per_test.coverdata via a new CoverageTriangulation.per_requirement_reach/2 function that mirrors execution_reach_map/2's input contract. Missing artifacts degrade to per-tab banners that piggyback quj.2's :degraded leg state.

Both call sites verified, not just definitions. - Intent-level scope concerns: none — degraded banners *complement* (don't duplicate) the page-level banner from quj.2; per-tab banner explains the consequence for the closure summary specifically. - Project verification: mix test 654 + 2 properties pass; mix spec.check status=pass errors=0 warnings=0 Verdict: PASS AUDIT: APPROVE (self-audit, cold-pass discipline) Session: in-thread Reasoning: Each of the requirement's claims has a failing-on-violation test: - "render Closure: N MFAs. Reached: M (by tests T1, T2). Unreached: K." — html_test.exs:992 asserts the literal "Closure: 4 MFAs.", "Reached: 1", "test/a_test.exs :: alpha", "Unreached: 1." against a fixture; reformatting the line breaks these. - "omit by-tests when no tests reach" — html_test.exs:1029 asserts both "Reached: 0." AND refute "by tests". - ":no_coverage_artifact degrades to a single banner" — html_test.exs:1067 asserts "Coverage artifact unavailable" AND refute cov-closure rows; review_test.exs:240 verifies the same path through build_view. - ":no_tracer_manifest degrades to its own banner" — html_test.exs:1077 asserts "Binding closure unavailable" AND refute cov-closure rows; review_test.exs:262 verifies via build_view. - "data sources" — coverage_triangulation_test.exs:per_requirement_reach/2 cases pin the input contract (sentinel handling, mfa+file counts, test name dedup/sort, lines_hit gating). No scope violations: diff is tight to the Coverage tab + triangulation + plumbing + tests + spec. No spec weakening; only added requirement. No new deps. mix spec.check clean. Per orchestration overrides: NOT closing ticket, NOT merging back, NOT cleaning up worktree. Stage branch + commit retained for orchestrator.
MERGED into specled_-qm1/spec-review-html. Closing per orchestrator.

title: Coverage tab: per-requirement bind-closure view
